goal: The ✕ close button on the card popup wasn't centered in its circle
root_cause: The ✕ was a text glyph (uneven font metrics, no line-height reset) and the <button> carried default UA padding, so place-items:center offset the glyph ~6px right / 2px down.
fix: reading.js: replaced the ✕ text with a centered SVG X (two strokes in a 24×24 viewBox). styles.css .card-sheet-close: padding:0 + line-height:0 so the 34×34 grid box centers the SVG exactly. Direct button click listener still closes (SVG clicks bubble).
verified: chrome MCP: SVG-vs-button centre offset now 0,0 (was 6,2); screenshot shows the X dead-centre in the circle. node --check ok; md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
